![kingkong](https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/kingkong/main2.jpg)

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Compatible with Gamer's Edition and Signature Edition

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Unlocked all resolutions in settings application

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed Aspect Ratio

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed HUD

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed Field of View

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed FMVs

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed an issue that could made the game run too fast when the CPU frequency is above 4.294 GHz

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Implemented a framerate limiter to avoid game breaking bugs (some levels are locked to 30 fps to prevent crashes)

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed an issue where, after the first encounter with King Kong and after V-Rex encounters in the V-Rex and Call Kong levels, the camera keeps shaking constantly at 60 fps

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Implemented raw mouse input for proper cursor and camera movement

$${\color{green}✔}$$ Fixed gamepad support in the main game and settings application, including vibration

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to disable blur on Necropolis, Brontosaurus, In The Mud, and New York levels, which also fixes broken damage overlay that otherwise is impossible to see through

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to adjust FOV via ini

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to make FMVs fullscreen

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to hide objects with broken geometry (Gamer's Edition bug)

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ Added an option to make windowed mode borderless

$${\color{blue}ⓘ}$$ To make Gamer's Edition load faster, download [KingKongGamersEdition.TextureCache.zip](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/releases/download/kingkong/KingKongGamersEdition.TextureCache.zip) and place `Textures` folder to the game root directory. Without it, the texture cache will be generated by Widescreen Fix on each loading screen and will only make subsequent loading faster

    Installation:
        Download and extract the archive to the game directory, where the exe is located.
